name: Peanut Butter Blossoms
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Monroe Evening News, Dec 10, 1995
Preheat oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit. Combine all ingredients except candy in a large bowl. Mix on the lowest speed of your mixer until dough forms. Shape the dough into balls, using a rounded teaspoon for each. Roll the balls in sugar; place them on ungreased cookie sheets. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 10 to 12 minutes. Top each cookie immediately with a candy and press down firmly so the cookie cracks around the edge. Makes about 48 cookies.
